description: Style Note york perfumes are known for its sophisticated fragrances and it's value for money. No ensemble is complete without the right fragrance and york has a flavor for every season. Emit the aura of a diva without burning a hole in your pocket. Encased in a delectable flacon, this perfume is a wardrobe essential this summer. Product Details Beauty Flower for women by York comes in an oval glass flacon with glitter in the perfume Caution Do not spray near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying on eyes Size 100 ml
